channel.title: Financial-Inclusion on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Financial-Inclusion on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: Why the Yield Curve is the Pulse of Every Bank
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A deep dive into the ‘gravitational constant’ of finance: the yield curve. Former UBX CEO John Januszczak explains how interest rate spreads drive banking physics and why inversions stall the engine of innovation.

item.title: Scaling Innovation: Beyond the Theatre of "New"
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: In this deep-dive episode of FINCIRCLE, John Januszczak explores the journey of building and scaling ventures in the fintech space. He shares insights on leadership, the transition from corporate executive to venture builder, and why scaling innovation requires more than just capital—it requires a fundamental shift in mindset and architecture.

item.title: While the West Debated Whitepapers, We Were Shipping Stablecoins
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A reflection on the 2019 launch of PHX and the i2i platform, highlighting the gap between theoretical ’tokenization’ and the ground-level reality of financial inclusion in the Philippines.

item.title: Signals: Week 05, 2026
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The professionalization of the AI era: Moving from vibe coding to agentic engineering, and why business is a design job.

item.title: CashBux
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A joint venture between UBX and AllBank that empowers MSMEs to act as ‘mobile ATMs’ offering cash withdrawals, bill payments, and card acceptance in underbanked communities.

item.title: Assured
item.author: john@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Insurtech platform that aggregates protection products from top carriers like Chubb, PGA Sompo, and Etiqa, allowing any digital channel to embed insurance coverage via a single API.
